form.formComment: Won her last three in a row including a narrow win last start over 300m at this track by a nose in a Grade 5. In hot form and can take this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won her last three in a row including a narrow win last start over 300m at this track by a nose in a Grade 5. In hot form and can take this out.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 300m at this track behind Sweet Embrace beaten 2.5 lengths (16.77). Right in the mix here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 300m at this track behind Sweet Embrace beaten 2.5 lengths (16.77). Right in the mix here.

form.formComment: Backs up after winning by 1.5 lengths at Q Lakeside (19.70) beating Redman Johnny in a P5 on April 8 five days ago. This is much harder assignment and she needs to find another gear.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after winning by 1.5 lengths at Q Lakeside (19.70) beating Redman Johnny in a P5 on April 8 five days ago. This is much harder assignment and she needs to find another gear.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fifth over 300m at this track. Likely to find this too tough.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Modest effort last time out when fifth over 300m at this track. Likely to find this too tough.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (16.71) in a Grade 5, finishing a nose second. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Has ability and should be around the money.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at this track (16.71) in a Grade 5, finishing a nose second. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Has ability and should be around the money.

form.formComment: Resuming from a three-and-a-half months spell and worth noting was a fresh up winner last time in, scoring in 19.91 at big odds over 352m at Q Lakeside. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resuming from a three-and-a-half months spell and worth noting was a fresh up winner last time in, scoring in 19.91 at big odds over 352m at Q Lakeside. Hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Finished in the placings last time but the run prior he was an impressive winner scoring by 1.75 lengths in a Grade 5 at this track. Top win two back and has claims here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the placings last time but the run prior he was an impressive winner scoring by 1.75 lengths in a Grade 5 at this track. Top win two back and has claims here.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by one length at this track over 300m (16.81) beating Lakoda Rusty in Grade 6 on April 6. Hard to entertain this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by one length at this track over 300m (16.81) beating Lakoda Rusty in Grade 6 on April 6. Hard to entertain this time.

form.formComment: Nearing another win after her success on March 12 at this track over 350m. Last start was fourth over 350m in 19.45, behind Kisses For Me. Leading contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Nearing another win after her success on March 12 at this track over 350m. Last start was fourth over 350m in 19.45, behind Kisses For Me. Leading contender.

form.formComment: Last start finished last in a Restricted WIN on March 31 over 457m at Q Lakeside behind Zipping Daytona beaten 15 lengths (26.31). Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.
